name: Hide of Terramorphous
description: A legendary Bandit shield that combines roid, spike, and nova effects into one brutal melee-focused package. It is built for aggressive close-range play and carries the highest roid bonus of any shield in the game.
notes:
The fire spikes and fire nova are bonus effects, not elemental shielding. It can spawn with Maliwan or Torgue capacitors, granting resistance or immunity to elemental damage over time, or resistance to explosive damage.

It is best used up close on melee-heavy builds. With Gaige, Sharing is Caring lets Deathtrap copy it, which means melee hits on him can trigger the fire spikes, and a shield break will trigger the fire nova and the large roid bonus. It is also very strong on Zer0 and Krieg. Hellborn builds can make good use of the fire effects, though you should avoid Inflammable if you want reliable self-ignition.

special.description: Combines roid, spike, and nova effects in a single shield, with the highest roid bonus in the game.
special.title: His hide turned the mightiest tame...

abilities: When depleted, melee attacks deal bonus Roid Damage.
Releases a Fire Nova blast when depleted.
